codeReview.evidence: Self-review found no diff whitespace issues, confirmed docs move, generated artifacts ignored, and no migration or persisted user data path introduced. Sub-agent role name retained for schema compatibility; actual sub-agent spawn was skipped because current tool policy forbids subagents without an explicit user request for delegation/subagents.

manualQa.evidence: Electron production-dist smoke launched LinkAtlas, observed Version 0.0.0 from typed preload API, verified process/require are absent in renderer, and cleanup found no LinkAtlas Electron or Playwright test processes.

surfaceEvidence.invocation: pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm test:integration && pnpm test:e2e
Playwright Electron manual smoke script against apps/desktop/dist/main/main.js

adversarialCases.scenario: Renderer, domain, and preload source must not bypass Electron security boundaries or expose generic privileged APIs.
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: Boundary tests pass and fail closed by scanning forbidden imports/API names; Electron unit tests assert nodeIntegration false, contextIsolation true, sandbox true.

artifactRefs.description: pnpm lint output including Biome and boundary tests.

gateReview.evidence: All criteria C001-C003 have pass evidence, verification commands are green, and the delivered scope stays within bootstrap limits.

criteriaCoverage.originalIntent: Execute the approved LinkAtlas bootstrap work plan and move DESIGN/CODEX_EXECUTION_PLAN into docs.
criteriaCoverage.desiredOutcome: Runnable pnpm TypeScript workspace with secure Electron React shell, typed contracts/domain packages, prompt/fixture readiness docs, and evidence-backed verification.
criteriaCoverage.userOutcomeReview: C001-C003 pass: CLI/build checks green, security boundary checks green, Electron shell launches through production dist and preload API, renderer has no Node globals, cleanup clean. Docs exist under docs/ and README references the new paths. No real SQLite/Ollama/URL ingestion/packaging was added beyond bootstrap scope.
